commit.message: ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Add root tsconfig.json, test script, repository field

Fixes quality scanner warnings for monorepo structure detection.

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.
ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Add root tsconfig.json, test script, repository field

Fixes quality scanner warnings for monorepo structure detection.

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

Fix iOS audio, RAF leak, wake lock, right-click, transitions

- Resume suspended AudioContext before scheduling nodes (iOS Safari
  blocks audio until explicitly resumed)
- Stop scheduling requestAnimationFrame after game ends instead of
  continuing to tick indefinitely
- Re-acquire Screen Wake Lock on visibilitychange so tab-switching
  doesn't permanently lose it
- Filter pointer button !== 0 to prevent right/middle-click taps
- transition-all on player buttons so box-shadow animates with bg
- Fix mute icon X coordinates (was clipped at viewBox edge)
- Bump landscape font from 10vh to 15vh (was too small on phones)
- Add relative to clock container for robust overlay positioning
- Simplify idle text to "Tap to start" (works for both layouts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Instant tap response, flag-fall sound, low-time pulse, sound toggle

- Switch player buttons from onClick to onPointerDown for instant
  response (~100-300ms faster on mobile) with touch-action: none
- Add touch-action: manipulation on root to prevent double-tap zoom
- Three-tone descending flag-fall sound + double-buzz vibration on
  time expiry
- Pulsing red text animation (animate-pulse) when time < 30s
- Sound toggle button (persisted to localStorage) in center controls
- Guard all audio with soundRef so mute is instant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add wake lock, click sound, haptics, keyboard shortcuts, persist TC

- Screen Wake Lock keeps display on during running/paused game
- Synthesized click sound via Web Audio on each tap (short freq sweep)
- Haptic feedback (10ms vibration) on tap for mobile devices
- Keyboard: Q/ArrowLeft = player 2, P/ArrowRight = player 1, Space = pause
- Last-used time control saved to localStorage and restored on load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.

Initial scaffold: Todo app for FreeAppStore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: mobile-friendly layout — keyboard resize, safe areas, touch targets

- Use visualViewport API so editor resizes when virtual keyboard opens
  instead of content hiding behind it
- Add viewport-fit=cover + safe-area-inset padding for notched phones
- Bump all touch targets to 44px minimum (buttons, list items)
- Set input/textarea font-size to 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom
- Add touch-action: manipulation to eliminate 300ms tap delay
- Add -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent
- Add overscroll-behavior: none to prevent pull-to-refresh interference
- Use 100dvh instead of 100vh for desktop (mobile uses visualViewport)
- Increase mobile font sizes for readability (list items, search)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pin notes, markdown preview, swipe-to-delete, tags, keyboard shortcuts

- Pin/unpin notes (pinned sort to top, accent dot in list)
- Markdown preview toggle (Cmd+E) with styled rendering
- Swipe left to delete on mobile (red Delete backdrop)
- Tags with pill UI, comma/Enter to add, Backspace to remove
- Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+N new, Cmd+F search, Cmd+E preview,
  Cmd+Backspace delete, Escape back/clear
- Search includes tags
- Backwards-compatible migration for existing localStorage notes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: split editor into bold title + body textarea

The single-textarea approach lost newlines because empty body was falsy,
causing editorContent to strip the \n on re-render. Splitting into a
title input (bold, 1.25rem) and body textarea fixes multiline editing
and gives the first line visual weight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: infinite canvas, sticky notes, select tool, keyboard shortcuts

Major rewrite from bitmap to element-based rendering:

- Infinite canvas with pan (scroll/middle-drag/space-drag) and zoom
  (ctrl+wheel/pinch). Camera transform applied to all elements.
- Element model: path, line, arrow, rect, ellipse, text, sticky, image.
  Undo/redo operates on element snapshots instead of pixel data.
- Sticky notes: click to place, double-click to edit, 6 color presets.
  Rendered with rounded corners, shadow, and word-wrapped text.
- Select tool (V): click to select, drag to move any element. Delete/
  Backspace to remove selected element.
- Keyboard shortcuts: V/P/E/L/A/R/O/T/S for tools, Ctrl+Z/Shift+Z
  for undo/redo, Ctrl+0 to reset view.
- Image paste: Ctrl+V pastes clipboard images onto canvas (resized to
  max 800px). Images stored as dataUrl in elements.
- Grid dots: toggleable dot grid in world space, adapts spacing to zoom.
- Dark mode toggle: cycles auto/light/dark via class on root element.
- Zoom indicator in sidebar with reset button.
- Migration: reads old bitmap drawings from v1 localStorage format and
  converts to image elements.
- Scene renderer extracted to render.ts, types to types.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add text, arrow, fill, and eyedropper tools

- Text tool: click to place a textarea, type, Enter to commit to canvas
  (Shift+Enter for newlines, Escape to cancel). Font size slider shown
  when text tool is active.
- Arrow tool: drag to draw a line with an arrowhead at the endpoint.
- Fill (bucket) tool: flood-fill clicked region with current color,
  30-tolerance for anti-aliased edges.
- Eyedropper (Pick) tool: click any pixel to sample its color and
  switch back to pen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: auto-create drawing, shape tools, brush cursor, thumbnails

- Auto-create first drawing on load so strokes save immediately
- Load last drawing from localStorage on mount
- Shape tools: line, rectangle, ellipse with live preview
- Dynamic SVG cursor that reflects brush size
- Thumbnail previews in the drawings list sidebar
- Prevent deleting last drawing (always keep at least one)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Add platform analytics loader

Embeds <script src=".../v1/analytics.js?app=<id>" defer></script> into
web/index.html so visits start showing up in the creator dashboard. The
loader is served from the platform Worker; tags evolve without a redeploy.

fix: declare maskable icon purpose for Android PWA install

Android Chrome installs PWAs as launcher shortcuts (not real apps with
their own task slot) unless the manifest declares at least one icon
with purpose: 'maskable'. Add 'any maskable' to both 192/512 entries
so installs land in the app drawer with an adaptive icon.

feat: persist calculator state and add calculation history

Saves current display/operand/operator to localStorage so the calculator
resumes where you left off. Completed calculations are stored as history
(up to 50 entries) and displayed in the sidebar (desktop) or via a toggle
button (mobile). Tapping a history entry loads its result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: inputs scale with font size, form/practice reset on pair switch

- Input/select font-size changed from fixed 16px to max(16px, 1rem)
  so they scale with the font size setting while preventing iOS zoom
- AddForm remounts (clears fields) when language pair changes
- PracticeTab remounts (resets index to 0) when pair changes
- Font scale 1.0 no longer overrides browser default font-size
- Font size slider labels use fixed 11px to stay stable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add font size setting, make fullscreen practice text larger

- Font size slider in Settings (80%-160%), persisted to localStorage
- Scales all rem-based text via root font-size; bottom nav stays fixed px
- Fullscreen practice: main text up to clamp(2.5rem, 14vw, 7rem),
  pronunciation and translation scaled proportionally
- Practice card text also increased for better readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: practice tab no longer skips phrases when "unpractised only" is on

The "Unpractised only" filter and topic filter from the Phrases tab
were also applied to the Practice tab. When a phrase was marked
practiced via "Got it", it disappeared from the list and the next
phrase was skipped. Practice now always shows all phrases for the
current pair regardless of list filters.

Add difficulty levels, stats/levelling, theme toggle, focus UX

Add difficulty levels, stats/levelling, theme toggle, focus UX

- Light theme is now the default; user can toggle dark via ☾/☀ button
  (stored in localStorage, no longer follows system preference)
- Easy / Normal / Hard difficulty selector — each uses a distinct word
  list (short common words / mixed / longer complex words)
- Level system: Beginner → Novice → Apprentice → Skilled → Advanced →
  Expert → Master, driven by personal-best WPM stored in localStorage
- Sidebar level card shows PB, progress bar to next level, test count
- Click-to-focus overlay on word display — clearly tells users to click
  before typing; disappears once focused
- Results screen shows ★ new personal best banner when PB is beaten
- Mode and difficulty tabs now use bg-[var(--ink)] highlight so active
  state is unambiguous in both light and dark themes
- Wider max-w-4xl content area removes dead space on desktop
- Timer enlarged to text-5xl display-font for better visual anchor
- useStats / useTheme hooks extracted; App wires them to Shell + TypingArea

ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Whenly: anonymous weekly time-slot voting app

Port from Firebase to FAS platform. Uses @freeappstore/sdk for data:
- polls collection for poll config (public read, owner write)
- votes collection for per-user votes (public read, owner write)
- GitHub OAuth via FAS shared auth
- Tailwind v4 UI with FAS design tokens
- Time grid with timezone conversion and auto-save voting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- claude-code.md: add non-interactive auth via gh CLI, full publish + push flow
- brand/SKILLS.md: fix broken curl compliance command → fas check

Add platform analytics loader

web/index.html so visits start showing up in the creator dashboard. The

Harden security: sanitize source links, add CSP, fence prompt context

Three findings from the audit:

- H1: source-link <a href> in the chat now passes through sanitizeUrl;
  persist.loadHistory rejects entries whose `sources` shape is wrong, so a
  tampered localStorage value can't smuggle a javascript: URL onto a clickable
  link.
- M1: web/public/_headers adds CSP (default-src 'self'; connect-src restricted
  to api.anthropic.com), nosniff, no-referrer, and a strict Permissions-Policy
  on Cloudflare Pages.
- M2: KB context is now wrapped in <context>…</context> and the system prompt
  tells the model to treat it as untrusted data — defense against prompt
  injection if a future KB source is less trustworthy than freeappstore.pages.dev.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Switch to BYO Anthropic key — direct browser call, stored in localStorage

Drops @freeappstore/sdk proxy in favour of a per-user key model: each visitor
provides their own Anthropic API key via a settings modal, stored locally
in localStorage on their device only. The key is sent directly to
api.anthropic.com using anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access:true.

Trade-off: removes the need for a developer-side fas secret + proxy setup
(so no single API key paying for all visitors), at the cost of asking each
visitor to bring their own key. Bundle drops ~3 KB after dropping the SDK.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PopulationAgent chatbot — Claude Sonnet 4.6 + live ABS data

Browser-only React app that uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 with tool use to answer
questions about Australian population. The Anthropic API is routed through
@freeappstore/sdk's secret-injecting proxy (key stored server-side via
fas secret set, never reaches the browser). ABS Data API is called directly
from the browser via fetch.

Five tools exposed to the agent: get_population, get_population_time_series,
compare_states, list_abs_dataflows, query_abs_dataset (escape hatch).
SDMX-JSON responses flattened into {period, value, dimensions} rows.

Chat history persists in localStorage. Streaming text deltas via SSE parsing.
Prompt caching: cache_control ephemeral on last tool definition (caches
tools + system prefix together; tools render before system in the request).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

detector: poll for window.faceapi, inject script as fallback

If the global isn't ready when React mounts (extension blocking /vendor/,
slow network, service-worker stale state), wait up to 6s and then dynamically
inject the script. Throw a useful error if it still fails.

- Hide sidebar/dock when viewing a PDF (hideChrome on Shell)
- A-/A+ controls change canvas render scale (not just CSS zoom)
- Invert mode + scale saved to localStorage, restored on reload

Add R2 deploy workflow

Copies deploy.yml from template-standalone so pushes to main
auto-deploy to the fas-apps R2 bucket.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Multi-step posting flow with rules + confirm + preloaded moderation

Flow: Rules → Camera → "Are you sure? You can only post one!" → Moderate → Upload

- Rules screen explains all 5 rules before camera opens
- AI models preload in background while user reads rules
- Confirmation step: "You can only post one face. This is it — forever on the wall."
- Moderation runs only after user confirms
- On failure, shows reason and offers Retake
- preloadModels() exported from moderate.ts for early background loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add client-side AI moderation: face, age, NSFW checks

All checks run in-browser — nothing leaves the device until approved:
- face-api.js: exactly 1 face required (no group, no faceless)
- age estimation: must be 18+ (ageGenderNet)
- nsfwjs: blocks nudity/porn (MobileNet classifier)

Models lazy-loaded only when user picks a photo (~1.3MB face-api
+ ~3MB tfjs/nsfw on first use). Main bundle stays at 70KB.

Photo cannot be uploaded until all checks pass. "Add to wall"
button is disabled during checking and on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Build Faces of the World: anonymous face wall PWA

Spin-off from ArtOut — people kept posting selfies, so we gave
them their own app. Circular face wall, selfie upload with front
camera, face-centered Cloudinary crops, auto city+country via
Nominatim. Two tabs: Wall + Snap. Dark theme, warm amber accent.

68KB gzipped. Zero API keys needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use correct CSS var names, improve flight card layout

All 63 inline style references used var(--color-X) but CSS defines
var(--X) — fixed to --paper, --ink, --muted, --line, --accent, --panel.
Stacked From/To with swap button, Google Flights-style timeline,
trip type toggle, text-only Compare/Save actions, best-price badge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

redesign: single-page layout, no tabs, Google Flights style

- Search form always visible at top (no tabs to navigate)
- Results appear below search instantly
- Saved + Compare are collapsible panels (not tabs)

Initial commit

Fix 7 bugs from code audit: enter-to-send, chat ID delimiter, room reuse, mobile UX

1. Enter-to-send broken: Enter always sent because form onSubmit fired
   even when enterToSend was false. Now preventDefault on all Enter,
   only call handleSend when pref is enabled.
2. Chat ID delimiter collision: makeChatId used ':' which conflicts
   with 'gh:' prefix in UIDs (gh:111:gh:222 is ambiguous). Changed
   to '|' delimiter (gh:111|gh:222).
3. Search result peer extraction: split(':') on chatId could not
   recover UIDs containing ':'. Added extractPeerUid that handles
   both '|' and legacy ':' formats by prefix/suffix matching.
4. Rapid sends exhausted rooms: each handleSend opened a new room.
   Now reuses a single sendRoomRef with 5s idle close timer, same
   pattern as typingRoomRef.
5. GitHub "Add friend" never disabled: compared actionLoading
   (gh:123) with String(gh.id) (123). Fixed to use gh: prefix.
6. Mobile context menu flash: click handler on message bubble
   immediately dismissed the context menu opened by long-press.
   Removed the conflicting onClick; backdrop overlay handles dismiss.
7. Toast timeout stacking: rapid copy+delete caused first timeout
   to clear second toast early. Now clears previous timeout via ref
   before setting new one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 6 bugs: URL regex, typing room leak, outbox race, clipboard, search nav, mobile delete

1. URL regex: global flag on shared regex caused stateful lastIndex,
   making every other URL in a message get missed. Replaced with
   fresh RegExp instance per parse call using exec() loop.
2. Typing indicator room leak: every keystroke opened a new WebSocket
   that could stay open forever if connection timing was unlucky. Now
   reuses a single room ref, closes after 5s idle, cleaned up on unmount.
3. Outbox retry race: setTimeout close fired async while loop opened
   next room, could exhaust 64-room cap. Now closes synchronously and
   awaits 200ms between retries.
4. Clipboard fallback: navigator.clipboard.writeText throws on HTTP
   and some mobile browsers. Added execCommand('copy') textarea fallback.
5. Search results navigate: clicking a search result now opens that
   chat via getOrCreateChat instead of being a dead-end display.
6. Mobile delete button: CSS :hover opacity trick was invisible on
   touch devices. Replaced with always-visible trash column + right-click
   context menu as alternative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
